record.field: Create a draft cash advance request for an employee. Returns the new liquidation ID and reference number. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.

{"type":"object","properties":{"employee_id":{"type":"integer","description":"Employee ID requesting the cash advance"},"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Cash advance amount requested"},"purpose":{"type":"string","description":"Purpose or description for the cash advance"}},"required":["employee_id","amount","purpose"]}
Submit a cash advance liquidation for manager approval. Changes state from draft to submitted. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.
{"type":"object","properties":{"liquidation_id":{"type":"integer","description":"ID of the hr.expense.liquidation record to submit"}},"required":["liquidation_id"]}
Run the policy engine against a cash advance or liquidation record. Returns a list of policy violations (warnings and blocking issues).
{"type":"object","properties":{"liquidation_id":{"type":"integer","description":"ID of the hr.expense.liquidation record to check"}},"required":["liquidation_id"]}
Query cash advances that are released but overdue for liquidation. Returns a list of overdue records with employee, amount, and days overdue.
{"type":"object","properties":{"days_threshold":{"type":"integer","description":"Number of days past release date to consider overdue","default":30}},"required":[]}
